title: PRÄSENT - Four Seasons Organza wired edge Ribbon Yellow 40 mm width, 25 m length
features: Perfect for floral, bridal, craft or home decorations.
Wired edges - perfect for packaging, bows, floral and crafts.
description: From the manufacturer From decorative ribbon to gift ribbon to pull bow – Präsent offers the right material for packaging and decorating. Perfect for beautifully wrapped gifts and magical decorations for celebrations such as weddings and Christmas. Our know-how makes us one of the most versatile manufacturers, for gift and decorative ribbons of the highest quality, known far beyond the borders of Germany. Present gift ribbon, plain Four Seasons ribbon With and without wire edge The slightly transparent Four Seasons ribbon from Präsent is a classic table decoration for a round birthday, anniversary, communion, confirmation, christening, elegant gift packaging for Christmas or a great decoration of gift baskets and flower arrangements. The ribbon is available with or without wired edge, so you can either tie large, dimensionally stable bows or use the airy ribbon as an ornament for a bouquet. Ideal for decorating and crafting for any occasion Great craft idea for friends, family and colleagues Plastic rolls made from 100% recycled material REACH compliant made in Germany 5 different widths, 39 different colours In the range of Präsent you will find the right decorative ribbon for every occasion. Whether a glittering curling ribbon, plain fabric ribbon with wired edge or a patterned ribbon, your creativity knows no bounds. The classic fabric ribbon is suitable as a table decoration, decoration or for making pretty gifts for your best friend, mum, dad, brother, sister, partner or favourite colleague. In the production of all PRÄSENT gift ribbons, the use of sustainable electricity as well as REACH compliant materials are used. Production takes place in Germany.
